# SU2 easy: one-iteration surface solve

Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and run a one-iteration direct solve that writes history and surface CSV outputs when SU2 is installed.

## Why This Case Exists

The easiest SU2 challenge should still be a real CFD solve with retained outputs, not just a help probe.

## Case Shape

- ID: `su2_easy`
- Family: `su2`
- Difficulty: `easy`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `command`
- Workflow Slice: `aerodynamics`
- Target Kind: `command`
- Upstream Target: `SU2_CFD`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/su2_easy/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

This case relies on its workflow without extra breadth assertions.

## Why This Stays A Challenge

This case keeps its ingestion recipe and workflow assertions in
`challenge.toml` instead of checking in companion `ingest.py` and
`use.py` scripts. That boundary is intentional: the challenge lane
should stay a compact problem statement rather than turning into a
worked answer key like the real-world example lane.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=su2_easy
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only su2_easy
```

## Prepared Inputs

- Render `challenges/cases/su2_easy/fixtures/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg.in` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg` before the workflow runs.

## Fixtures

- `challenges/cases/su2_easy/fixtures/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg.in`
- `challenges/cases/su2_easy/fixtures/mesh_NACA0012_inv.su2`

## Workflow

### 1. Run a one-iteration SU2 direct solve and retain history plus surface outputs

Tool: `run_su2_cfd`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "cwd": "{challenge_artifact_dir}",
  "extra_argv": [
    "{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg"
  ]
}
```

Expectations: json fields {'exit_code': 0}; files are non-empty ['{challenge_artifact_dir}/history.csv', '{challenge_artifact_dir}/surface_flow.csv'].

## What This Case Proves

- A heavyweight optional CFD CLI can live in the challenge suite while still doing real analysis work.
- The generated wrapper can retain concrete SU2 convergence and surface-output artifacts.

## Known Limits

- This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: the shallowest useful SU2 direct-analysis workflow.
# This easy rung keeps the solve to one iteration while retaining the history and surface CSV outputs.
id = "su2_easy"
title = "SU2 easy: one-iteration surface solve"
tier = "local_full"
style = "command"
slice = "aerodynamics"
family = "su2"
difficulty = "easy"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and run a one-iteration direct solve that writes history and surface CSV outputs when SU2 is installed."
motivation = "The easiest SU2 challenge should still be a real CFD solve with retained outputs, not just a help probe."
proves = [
  "A heavyweight optional CFD CLI can live in the challenge suite while still doing real analysis work.",
  "The generated wrapper can retain concrete SU2 convergence and surface-output artifacts.",
]
limitations = [
  "This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.",
]

[target]
kind = "command"
value = ["SU2_CFD"]

[probe]
commands = [["SU2_CFD"]]

[scaffold]
kind = "command"
function_name = "run_su2_cfd"
help_probe_args = ["-h"]

[setup]
[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg.in"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg"

[workflow]
[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Run a one-iteration SU2 direct solve and retain history plus surface outputs"
tool = "run_su2_cfd"
arguments = { extra_argv = ["{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_easy.cfg"], cwd = "{challenge_artifact_dir}" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
json_fields = { exit_code = 0 }
files_nonempty = [
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/history.csv",
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/surface_flow.csv",
]
```
